transitions: transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), opacity 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), background-color 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), -webkit-transform 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1)

rules.cssText: .u-from-mobile { border: 0px; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; }
.u-from-desktop { border: 0px; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; }

html:not(.disable-motion).no-touchevents .home-cases-headline, html:not(.disable-motion).no-touchevents .home-cases-line, html:not(.disable-motion).no-touchevents .home-cases-picture { opacity: 0; animation-fill-mode: both; }

.site-menu-item a::before { position: absolute; top: 20px; right: calc(100% + 30px); font-family: Gilroy, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-style: normal; content: "0" counter(b); transition: color 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); color: rgba(219, 223, 244, 0.15); font-size: 0.714286rem; letter-spacing: 0.36em; }
.site-menu-footer { position: absolute; right: 45px; bottom: 45px; left: 45px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; }
.site-menu-content a { display: block; width: 30px; height: 30px; border: 2px solid rgba(187, 194, 229, 0.2); border-radius: 50%; }
.site-header-cases, .site-header-posts { position: relative; top: auto; right: auto; display: inline-block; }

.menu-active.header-sticky .site-header { transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), background-color 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1), -webkit-transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.165, 0.84, 0.44, 1); background-color: transparent; }
.site-footer-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; }
.site-footer-block--social { width: 100%; margin-top: 50px; flex-direction: row-reverse; justify-content: space-between; }
.site-footer-block--social a { height: 30px; width: 30px; padding: 0px; display: block; border: 2px solid rgba(160, 168, 220, 0.7); border-radius: 50%; }
.site-footer-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.site-footer-right { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.site-cookie { bottom: 0px; border-radius: 0px; padding: 45px 30px; width: 100%; max-width: 100%; left: 0px; }
.home-hero .center { display: flex; flex-flow: column wrap; justify-content: space-between; }
.home-hero-showreel { position: absolute; top: 60px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
.no-touchevents .home-cases-scenes { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100vh; width: 100%; }
.no-touchevents .home-cases-scene { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; width: 100%; }
.home-cases-picture { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: 100%; width: 100%; opacity: 0.5; z-index: -1; }
.no-touchevents .home-cases-picture { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; height: 100%; width: 100%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); max-width: 1440px; max-height: 780px; }
.no-touchevents .home-cases-content { position: absolute; right: 45px; bottom: 100px; height: auto; width: 500px; z-index: 1; text-align: right; }
.home-about-text { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: flex-start; margin-right: -25px; margin-left: -25px; }
.home-about-text p { height: auto; width: 50%; padding-right: 25px; padding-left: 25px; }
.values-hero-content { position: relative; z-index: 2; width: 100%; margin-top: 320px; padding-left: 0px; }
.values-list-header { position: absolute; top: 1195px; right: 38px; height: auto; width: 310px; }
.values-list-header { position: absolute; top: 200px; right: 35px; height: auto; width: auto; }
.values-list-footer { position: absolute; bottom: 5px; left: 35px; height: auto; width: 310px; }
.values-list-footer { position: absolute; bottom: 280px; left: 45px; height: auto; width: auto; }
.values-list-row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-right: -40px; margin-left: -40px; }
.post-header-back { position: relative; top: auto; right: auto; margin-bottom: 30px; margin-left: 35px; display: inline-block; }
.post-medias--gallery .post-medias-list { display: flex; transition: transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1), -webkit-transform 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.19, 1, 0.22, 1); }
.case-header-website + .case-header-year { position: absolute; right: 45px; bottom: 0px; height: auto; width: auto; }

.reasons-number { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; height: auto; width: 100%; font-family: Heebo, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 300; font-style: normal; display: flex; align-items: center; max-width: 200px; transition: opacity 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); font-size: 1.64286rem; letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; }
.reasons-number.is-fixed { position: fixed; top: 50%; left: 0px; transform: translateY(-50%); }

.reasons-number .reasons-line { margin-left: 20px; position: relative; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) 0.1s, -webkit-transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) 0.1s; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); }
.reasons-number .reasons-line, .reasons-number .scroll-indicator { height: 1px; width: 100%; display: block; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left center; }
.reasons-number .scroll-indicator { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 73, 64); }
.careers-list .careers-list-location { margin-right: auto; margin-left: auto; max-width: 100%; padding-left: 0px; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="home"]::before { position: absolute; top: 50px; right: 0px; height: 562px; width: 500px; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="home"]::before { position: absolute; top: 50px; right: auto; left: 50%; height: 450px; width: 400px; transform: translateX(-50%); }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="about"]::before { position: absolute; top: 460px; left: -40px; height: 383px; width: 500px; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="about"]::before { position: absolute; top: 35px; right: 35px; left: auto; height: 383px; width: 500px; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="about"]::before { position: absolute; top: 140px; right: auto; left: 50%; height: 307px; width: 400px; transform: translateX(-50%); }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-item--2 .line { position: absolute; top: -110px; right: calc(100% - 20px); height: 1px; width: 380px; z-index: 2; transform: rotate(-45deg); }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:first-child { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; padding-top: 0px; padding-left: 0px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:nth-child(4) { margin-bottom: 25px; padding-bottom: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(219, 223, 244, 0.4); }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:nth-child(2)::after, [data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:nth-child(4)::after { content: " - " attr(data-after); }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:nth-child(3), [data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr td:nth-child(5) { display: none; }
[data-router-view="about"] .about-table tr:last-child td:nth-child(4) { margin-bottom: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; border: 0px none; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="values"]::before { position: absolute; top: 420px; left: -80px; height: 499px; width: 500px; }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="values"]::before { position: absolute; top: 225px; left: 50%; height: 499px; width: 500px; transform: translateX(-50%); }
.disable-dog [data-router-view="values"]::before { position: absolute; top: 420px; left: 50%; height: 399px; width: 400px; }
.error404 .not-found figure { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: -100px; left: -100px; height: 100%; width: calc(100% + 200px); }
[data-theme="case-orw"] .post-contents .post-quote { height: auto; width: 100%; padding-top: 40px; padding-bottom: 50px; background-image: none; }
